title: Odds N' Ends
description: A Mod Focusing On Adventure And Agriculture!
body:
Odds N' Ends(OnE) is a mod that currently is focused on Food and Agroculture :D

# What does it do?
OnE currently adds quite a few things; 
Ciderines are a fantasy citrus in the game, coming with their own woodset (it doesnt have boats because I hate boats)

Laco is another fantasy plant, similar to chocolate

Algae...

Field Clovers, spawining in Sunflower Plains and Meadows they can be brewed into strength potions for luck!

Rusty Clovers, spawning in Taigas they ar usually found near Spineroot, giving them a bad rep. they can be brewed into weakness potions for unluck.

Flax Flowers spawining around Meadows they craft light blue dye, (to plant the crop version you currently need seeds from a village)

# Will this port to X version?
I only have plans to update to 1.21.1 neoforge

# Can i port this to X version?
Please don't! ^^;

# Compat!!
yes yes, we have;
Farmer's Delight (crates, bags, cutting recipe support, and Ciderine Cider)
Neapolitan (3 new ice cream flavors, plus a bonus Minty Ciderine flavor!)
Bountiful Fares (Ciderine Blocks and Candied Ciderine)

# Credits!!
[ThatJadenXgamer](https://x.com/ThatJadenXgamer) - help on some Mixins and Java classes!
